CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS UpdateDeferralEndTimeBeforeInsert BEFORE INSERT ON DEFERRALHISTORY FOR EACH ROW BEGIN     UPDATE DEFERRALHISTORY     SET DEFERRALENDTIME = NEW.DEFERRALSTARTTIME     WHERE PROVIDERID = NEW.PROVIDERID       AND UPDATEID = NEW.UPDATEID       AND ACTION = NEW.ACTION       AND DEFERRALENDTIME IS NULL; END;
